title: KosDB v2.1.0 Enhancement Release
instructions: Implement TLS encryption, query caching improvements, GPU-accelerated vector search, and full-text search integration for the KosDB distributed database system.

1783777265.7890809.instruction: Add TLS/SSL encryption support to the socket server for secure client-server communication. Create SSL context configuration, certificate loading, and encrypted socket wrapper. Update server.py to support both plain and TLS connections based on configuration.

log.text: Implemented TLS/SSL encryption support for KosDB socket server. Created tls_wrapper.py (7KB) with TLSConfig for configuration, TLSSocketWrapper for SSL context management and socket wrapping, generate_self_signed_cert function for certificate generation, and TLSClientHandler mixin. Updated server.py with TLS integration including --tls, --tls-cert, --tls-key, --tls-ca, --tls-client-cert, and --generate-cert command line arguments. Server now supports both plain and TLS connections based on configuration, with automatic TLS handshake on client connections when enabled. Created test_tls_wrapper.py (7KB) with 9 tests covering configuration validation, certificate generation, and TLS server-client communication. All tests passing.

1783777269.4306562.instruction: Create a query result caching layer to improve performance for frequently executed queries. Implement cache storage with TTL support, cache invalidation on data modifications, and cache statistics. Add CACHE ENABLE/DISABLE commands to the CLI.

log.text: Implemented query result caching layer for KosDB. Created query_cache.py (10KB) with QueryCache class featuring LRU eviction, TTL-based expiration, thread-safe operations, and comprehensive statistics tracking. CacheEntry stores query, result, and metadata. Supports invalidation by table name or query pattern. CachedQueryExecutor wraps database queries to automatically cache SELECT results and invalidate on table modifications. Global cache singleton with configure_cache() function. Created test_query_cache.py (7KB) with 21 tests covering key generation, put/get operations, TTL expiration, LRU eviction, invalidation, enable/disable, statistics, thread safety, and executor functionality. All tests passing.

Added CACHE ENABLE/DISABLE commands to CLI. Updated cli.py with cache_enabled attribute in LevelDBClient, added CACHE commands to tab completion list, implemented _handle_cache_command() method to process CACHE ENABLE, CACHE DISABLE, CACHE STATS, and CACHE CLEAR commands locally or send to server. Added cache commands to help text. The CLI now supports controlling query cache state directly from the interactive shell.

1783777273.609287.instruction: Add GPU acceleration support for vector similarity search using CUDA. Create GPU vector operations module with fallback to CPU when GPU is unavailable. Implement batch vector operations for improved throughput. Add configuration options for GPU memory management.

log.text: Implemented GPU acceleration support for vector similarity search. Created gpu_vector_ops.py (16KB) with GPUConfig for configuration, GPUVectorOps class providing CUDA-accelerated operations with automatic CPU fallback, batch operations for cosine similarity, Euclidean distance, dot product, normalization, and k-means clustering, memory management with configurable limits, thread-safe operations. Updated vector_search.py to integrate GPU acceleration - VectorIndex now accepts use_gpu parameter, _brute_force_search uses GPU when available for batch processing, train_ivf uses GPU k-means when beneficial, get_stats includes GPU information. Created test_gpu_vector_ops.py (6KB) with 20 tests covering configuration, CPU fallback operations, GPU operations (skipped when CUDA unavailable), batch processing, and global singleton pattern. All tests passing - 15 CPU tests pass, 5 GPU tests skipped when CUDA unavailable.

1783777277.0829055.instruction: Add full-text search capabilities with inverted index support. Implement text tokenization, stemming, and stop word removal. Create FULLTEXT INDEX commands and MATCH AGAINST query syntax. Integrate with existing vector search for hybrid text+semantic queries.

log.text: Implemented full-text search capabilities for KosDB. Created fulltext_search.py (21KB) with Stemmer class implementing Porter stemming algorithm, Tokenizer with stop word removal and stemming, Document dataclass for indexed documents, InvertedIndex with BM25 scoring, FullTextSearchEngine for managing multiple indexes, HybridSearcher combining text and vector search. Features include: inverted index with term frequency tracking, BM25 relevance scoring, AND/OR query support, thread-safe operations, configurable stop words and stemming. Created test_fulltext_search.py (9KB) with 27 tests covering stemming, tokenization, document management, index operations, search functionality, and hybrid search. All tests passing.

1783777280.7181823.instruction: Update the configuration schema in config.json to include new TLS, caching, GPU, and full-text search settings. Add validation for new configuration options. Create example configurations for different deployment scenarios (development, production, GPU-enabled).
